## 🔖 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Build configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security update
- [ ] 🤖 CI/CD update

## 🧪 Testing

### Test Coverage

- [ ] Integration tests added/updated

### Manual Testing

<!-- Describe the manual testing you performed -->

```bash
# Commands used for testing
pnpm test
pnpm test:e2e
pnpm test:cov
```

**Test Results:**

- [ ] ✅ All tests pass
- [ ] ✅ No new warnings or errors
- [ ] ✅ Code coverage maintained or improved

## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My code follows TypeScript best practices
- [ ] I have removed unnecessary console.logs and debug code

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments to new functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md file
- [ ] Type definitions are up to date

### Testing & Quality

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
- [ ] I have run `pnpm run lint` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `pnpm run type-check` with no errors

### Security & Dependencies

- [ ] I have checked for security vulnerabilities (`pnpm audit`)
- [ ] Dependencies are up to date
- [ ] No sensitive data (credentials, keys) is included
- [ ] Snyk scan passes

### Git & Commits

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have rebased on the latest base branch
- [ ] There are no merge conflicts
